required_contains.text: - **Yuma Consensus** — on-chain settlement that turns validator weights into emission shares.
Hotkeys sign weight submissions; Yuma processes validator weights into rewards

forbidden_contains.text: Yuma Consensus aggregates submitted weights and credits miner incentives and validator dividends
when the epoch closes on the selected netuid
Coldkeys secure funds and authorize high-risk moves; hotkeys sign routine subnet operations
including weight setting. Key vocabulary names who can submit; Yuma names how those submissions
